data.title: Hedge Fund Achieves Remarkable Returns in Cryptocurrency Sector
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, a key strategist behind the lobbying efforts that turned U.S. President Donald Trump into a strong supporter of cryptocurrency is making significant investments in one of the industry's hottest areas, yielding impressive returns.

Insiders report that David Bailey's hedge fund, 210k Capital, achieved a net return of 640% over the 12 months ending in June, far surpassing Bitcoin's own growth. The fund has invested in approximately a dozen companies that have transitioned into Bitcoin purchasers.

As of June 30, 210k Capital managed assets totaling $433 million.

data.title: dYdX acquires crypto social trading platform Pocket Protector, marking its first external acquisition
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Decentralized derivatives exchange dYdX has completed the acquisition of crypto social trading platform Pocket Protector, which is its first external acquisition. The transaction was completed in the form of a combination of cash + DYDX tokens, and the specific amount was not disclosed. The two co-founders of Pocket Protector will join dYdX as president and head of growth respectively, and the Telegram trading robot (including copy trading function) and the 9-person technical team they developed will be incorporated into dYdX. Pocket Protector was founded last year and has raised $7 million from investors such as Electric Capital and Dragonfly. (The Block)

data.title: Bit Digital increased its holdings by 19,683 ETH, bringing its total holdings to over 120,000 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Nasdaq-listed Bit Digital announced that it has used the net proceeds from the recently completed $67.3 million registered private placement to institutional investors to purchase approximately 19,683 Ethereum. After the transaction is completed, Bit Digital holds approximately 120,306 ETH. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Two related wallets transferred 2,831 MKR to Binance, earning $1.58 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, two possibly related wallets transferred 2,831 MKR (about 6.03 million US dollars) to Binance, with a cumulative profit of 1.58 million US dollars. The two wallets withdrew 8,251 MKR (about 11.86 million US dollars) from Binance 3-4 months ago, and one of the addresses still holds 3,420 MKR (about 7.4 million US dollars).

data.title: JD CoinChain Technology: JD Stablecoin has not been issued, and all trading platforms JD-HKD/USD are counterfeit
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Recently, someone has pretended to be JD.com and released a digital currency called JD-HKD on a mainstream trading platform to deceive users into participating in transactions. These deceptive behaviors not only damage the legitimate rights and interests of JD.com Coin Chain Technology, but also cause damage to users participating in the transaction. JD.com Coin Chain Technology has communicated with mainstream trading platforms to remove related digital currencies and issued an announcement to remind users. JD.com Coin Chain Technology stated that as a participant in the Hong Kong Monetary Authority's stablecoin issuer sandbox, it fully complies with the process of implementation of Hong Kong's regulatory guidance. Before obtaining the Hong Kong Stablecoin Issuer License, all the issuance of coins with the words JD Stablecoin, JD-HKD, JD-USD, etc., to attract users to buy, and the issuance of coins under the name of JD.com or JD.com's partners are all scams. JD.com will not issue any governance tokens other than JD Stablecoin. (Interface)

data.title: Ethereum Surpasses Costco in Global Market Capitalization Rankings
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from 8marketcap reveals that Ethereum's market capitalization has exceeded $437 billion. This milestone places Ethereum above the membership-based warehouse retailer Costco, elevating it to the 29th position in global asset market capitalization rankings.

data.title: Planet Evening News
Trump Administration Officials Hold Significant Cryptocurrency Assets
data.description:
According to PANews, a report by The Washington Post reveals that U.S. President Donald Trump possesses virtual currency assets totaling $51 million. The investigation into the financial disclosures of approximately 300 senior officials in the Trump administration found that about one in five holds virtual currency. The analysis identified around 70 officials who either own cryptocurrencies or have investments in blockchain-related enterprises. The Washington Post requested financial information from all government nominees approved by the Senate as of the 3rd of the month, receiving responses from 95% of them. The media outlet independently filtered the financial data to identify blockchain or cryptocurrency-related holdings, wallets, or enterprises. Typically, officials disclose asset ranges rather than exact amounts, so estimates were made using the minimum value within those ranges.

The investigation estimates that the total virtual currency assets declared by senior Trump administration officials amount to at least $193 million. The highest amount is held by Ken Howery, the U.S. Ambassador to Denmark and PayPal co-founder, with virtual assets worth $120 million. President Trump follows, while the third-highest holder has assets in the million-dollar range. Vice President J.D. Vance reportedly holds $250,000 in virtual assets.

data.title: Ethereum's market value exceeds Costco, and its global asset market value ranking rises to 29th
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that 8marketcap data showed that the market value of Ethereum exceeded 437 billion US dollars, surpassing the membership-based warehouse retailer Costco (423 billion US dollars), and ranked 29th in the global asset market value.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 3,600 USDT with a Narrowed 4.34% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jul 18, 2025, 11:20 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 3,600 USDT and is now trading at 3,599.820068 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 4.34% increase in 24 hours.
